url.description: URL to the mirror. Can be a simple path, or any protocol Spack supports (https, OCI).

bootstrap.description: Whether to use as a mirror for bootstrapping. Will also use as a regular mirror.

cache.description: Use this mirror as the buildcache push destination. Can only be enabled on a single mirror.

public_key.description: Public PGP key for validating binary cache packages. A path or base64 encoded key.

private_key.description: Private PGP key for signing binary cache packages. (Path only)

mount_specific.description: Use a mount specific buildcache path (specified path + recipe mount point).
